The} shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Otliclal Gazette. 3. For rule 3 of the National Green Tribunal (MannerofAppointmem of Judicial and Expen Members, Salaries. Allo ••••.ances and other Terms and Conditions of Service of Chairperson and olhcr Members Rules, 20 I0 (hereinafter referred 10 as the .saId rules), the following rule shall be substiruted, namely :- "(3) Selection Commiuee.-·The Judicial Members and Expert Members of tile Tribunal shall be appointed by the Central Government on the reciimmendation ora Selection Committee comprising the following, namely:- (a) Sitting Judge of the Supreme Court to be nominated by the Chief Justice of India in consultation With the Ministe~ for Law and Justice-Chairperson; tb) Chairperson of the Tribunal-Member; (c) Director. Indian Institute ofTechnology, (By rotation)--Mcmber: (d) An expert in Environmental Policy 10 be nominated by the Minister for Environment and Forests-Member; (e) An expert in Forests Policy to be nominated by the Minister for Environment and Forests-Member; (0 Secretary to the Government of India in the Ministry ofEn\ Ironment and Forests-Membcr-Secretary", 4 In rule 5 ofthe said rules, in sub-rule (3). for the words "if necessary, by the Central Govemment"lhe words "by a committee comprising: (i) Additional Secretary. Ministry of Environment and Forests. to be nominated by the Minister for Environment and Forests. {Ii, An officer not below the level of Additional Director General of Forests, to be nominated by the Minister for F.nviro~ment and Forests, and (iii) Joint Secretary, dealing WIth the subject matter in the Ministry of Environment and Forests to be nominated by the Secretary, wbo shall be the Mcmber-Convenor" shall be substituted. 5, For rule 6 of the said rules. the following rule shall be substituted. namely:~ "6.
